blocks.text: Bildad the Shuhite said in reply:
Dominion and dread are His; He imposes peace in His heights.
Can His troops be numbered? On whom does His light not shine?
How can man be in the right before God? How can one born of woman be cleared of guilt?
Even the moon is not bright, And the stars are not pure in His sight.
How much less man, a worm, The son-of-man, a maggot.
